description_long: This is a two-story wooden house with a brown gable roof and horizontal siding, featuring a large wraparound deck on one side. The house has numerous rectangular windows arranged in symmetrical rows, providing ample natural light to the interior. The main entryway is accessed by a set of steps leading to a small covered porch with a wooden door and railing. The rear of the house includes a secondary door and a large deck area, suitable for outdoor activities. The roof is steeply pitched, and the overall design is reminiscent of a traditional American Craftsman or Colonial style. The structure appears robust, with visible support beams and a combination of wood and glass materials.
description: A two-story wooden house with a brown gable roof, wraparound deck, and symmetrical window rows. Features a covered porch entry and extensive outdoor decking.
description_view_0: Side view showing the long deck, multiple windows, and the main body of the house with its brown gable roof.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the covered porch, main entry steps, and symmetrical window arrangement above the entryway.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the secondary door, large deck area, and additional windows along the back wall.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a smaller deck, single door, and a simpler window arrangement.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with steps, wooden door, and simple railing
